mano_cua.result_summary: Space Exploration模组(/sxp)正常加载。科技过滤对话框正常工作：打开、切换科技(571→35)、级联锁定均正常。刷新后页面未崩溃，设置通过URL持久化。List页面正常显示配方和产品(Iron plate显示3行生产链，solver找到最优解)。控制台无JS错误。/sxe路径返回404但/sxp正常。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Space Exploration mod (/sxp) works correctly with researched technology filtering. Toggling technologies on/off updates available recipes. App remains stable through refresh cycles. List page shows recipes and products correctly. No crashes, no errors, no blank pages.
